case_title: SEARS,JEFFREY R. VS TARANTINO,LEONA TRUSTEE,-MARCEL LAZZARESCHI TRUST et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TARANTINO,LEONA TRUSTEE,-MARCEL LAZZARESCHI TRUST
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-03-1993, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JAN-11-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEARS,JEFFREY R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAZZARESCHI, MARCEL- TRUST $3,944.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,959.00, DEFT IS ORDERED TO REPAIR LEAK DAMAGE AND PREVENT FURTHER LEAKAGE; DEFT SHALL PROVIDE AMPLE HEAT AND STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
